data/maps/FallarborTown_House2/text.inc.FallarborTown_MoveRelearnersHouse_Text_I:
I'm the MOVE TUTOR.\pI know all the moves that POKéMON
learn - every one of them - and I can\lteach POKéMON those moves.\pI can teach a move to a POKéMON
of yours if you'd like.\pI'll do it for a HEART SCALE.
I'm collecting those now.
data/maps/FallarborTown_House2/text.inc.FallarborTown_MoveRelearnersHouse_Text_T: Oh! That's it! That's an honest to\ngoodness HEART SCALE!\pLet me guess, you want me to teach\na move?
data/maps/FallarborTown_House2/text.inc.FallarborTown_MoveRelearnersHouse_Text_D: Sorry...\pIt doesn't appear as if I have any move\nI can teach that POKéMON.
data/maps/FallarborTown_House2/text.inc.FallarborTown_MoveRelearnersHouse_Text_H: {PLAYER} handed over one HEART SCALE\nin exchange.
data/maps/FallarborTown_House2/text.inc.FallarborTown_MoveRelearnersHouse_Text_C: If your POKéMON need to learn a move,\ncome back with a HEART SCALE.
Hunh? There isn't a single move that\nI can teach an EGG.
